程序包 com.bstek.ureport.expression.parse

类 ExpressionVisitor

java.lang.Object
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.AbstractParseTreeVisitor<Expression>
com.bstek.ureport.dsl.ReportParserBaseVisitor<Expression>
com.bstek.ureport.expression.parse.ExpressionVisitor
所有已实现的接口:
ReportParserVisitor<Expression>, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<Expression>
public class ExpressionVisitor extends ReportParserBaseVisitor<Expression>
从以下版本开始:
2016年11月18日
作者:
Jacky.gao

    说明

    parseItemContext(ReportParserParser.ItemContext itemContext)
     
    Expression
    visitEntry(ReportParserParser.EntryContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by ReportParserParser.entry().
    Expression
    visitExpression(ReportParserParser.ExpressionContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by ReportParserParser.expression().
    BaseExpression
    visitParenJoin(ReportParserParser.ParenJoinContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by the parenJoin labeled alternative in ReportParserParser.item().
    BaseExpression
    visitSimpleJoin(ReportParserParser.SimpleJoinContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by the simpleJoin labeled alternative in ReportParserParser.item().

    从类继承的方法 com.bstek.ureport.dsl.ReportParserBaseVisitor

    visitAbsolute, visitAggregate, visitBlock, visitCaseExpr, visitCasePart, visitCell, visitCellCoordinate, visitCellCoordinateCondition, visitCellNameExprCondition, visitCellPair, visitCellPosition, visitComplexExprComposite, visitConditions, visitCoordinate, visitCurrentCellData, visitCurrentCellValue, visitCurrentValue, visitCurrentValueCondition, visitDataset, visitElseIfPart, visitElsePart, visitExpr, visitExprBlock, visitExprCondition, visitFunction, visitFunctionParameter, visitIfCondition, visitIfExpr, visitIfPart, visitJoin, visitParenExprComposite, visitProperty, visitPropertyCondition, visitRange, visitRelative, visitRelativeCell, visitReturnExpr, visitSimpleData, visitSimpleValue, visitSingleCell, visitSingleCellCondition, visitSingleCellCoordinate, visitSingleExprComposite, visitSingleParenJoin, visitTernaryExpr, visitTernaryExprComposite, visitUnit, visitVariable, visitVariableAssign, visitWholeCell

    从类继承的方法 org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.AbstractParseTreeVisitor

    aggregateResult, defaultResult, shouldVisitNextChild, visit, visitChildren, visitErrorNode, visitTerminal

  • 构造器详细资料

    • ExpressionVisitor

      public ExpressionVisitor(List<ExpressionBuilder> expressionBuilders)

  • 方法详细资料

    • visitEntry

      public Expression visitEntry(ReportParserParser.EntryContext ctx)
      从类复制的说明: ReportParserBaseVisitor
      Visit a parse tree produced by ReportParserParser.entry().

      The default implementation returns the result of calling AbstractParseTreeVisitor.visitChildren(org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.RuleNode) on ctx.

      指定者:
      visitEntry 在接口中 ReportParserVisitor<Expression>
      覆盖:
      visitEntry 在类中 ReportParserBaseVisitor<Expression>
      参数:
      ctx - the parse tree
      返回:
      the visitor result

    • visitExpression

      public Expression visitExpression(ReportParserParser.ExpressionContext ctx)
      从类复制的说明: ReportParserBaseVisitor
      Visit a parse tree produced by ReportParserParser.expression().

      The default implementation returns the result of calling AbstractParseTreeVisitor.visitChildren(org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.RuleNode) on ctx.

      指定者:
      visitExpression 在接口中 ReportParserVisitor<Expression>
      覆盖:
      visitExpression 在类中 ReportParserBaseVisitor<Expression>
      参数:
      ctx - the parse tree
      返回:
      the visitor result

    • visitSimpleJoin

      public BaseExpression visitSimpleJoin(ReportParserParser.SimpleJoinContext ctx)
      从类复制的说明: ReportParserBaseVisitor
      Visit a parse tree produced by the simpleJoin labeled alternative in ReportParserParser.item().

      The default implementation returns the result of calling AbstractParseTreeVisitor.visitChildren(org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.RuleNode) on ctx.

      指定者:
      visitSimpleJoin 在接口中 ReportParserVisitor<Expression>
      覆盖:

      参数:

      返回:
      the visitor result

      public BaseExpression visitParenJoin(ReportParserParser.ParenJoinContext ctx)
      从类复制的说明: ReportParserBaseVisitor
      Visit a parse tree produced by the parenJoin labeled alternative in ReportParserParser.item().

      The default implementation returns the result of calling AbstractParseTreeVisitor.visitChildren(org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.RuleNode) on ctx.
